bead.title: plugin lookup precedence: project → global → baked-in, plus skill-install-topology ADR
bead.description:
PROBLEM (Principle 2 of epic ddx-602ae31a, slice 1 of 4)

Runtime resolution of a named plugin must follow a fixed precedence so that a project-local install always shadows a machine-wide global install, and the baked-in default ddx plugin is the last resort. Without a single resolution entry point, every caller (install, update, doctor, runtime skill loading) would re-derive the search order and drift.

ROOT CAUSE
- The resolution logic lives in `cli/internal/registry/resolve.go:29` (`ResolvePlugin(ctx, projectRoot, name) (path, layer, err)`). It checks `ddxroot.Path(ctx, projectRoot)/plugins/<name>` (resolve.go:30-33), then `ddxroot.GlobalDir()/plugins/<name>` (resolve.go:35-37), then the baked-in default for the "ddx" name only (resolve.go:41), else error (resolve.go:44).
- `ddxroot.Path` (cli/internal/ddxroot/ddxroot.go:75) transparently returns the in-tree `<project>/.ddx` path or the convention `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/projects/<host>/<owner>/<repo>` path, so the project branch of precedence works in both modes without special-casing.
- `ddxroot.GlobalDir()` (ddxroot.go:90) returns `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global`.

PROPOSED FIX
Ensure `ResolvePlugin` is the single source of truth for precedence and that its three documented layers ("project", "global", "baked-in") are correct and covered by tests. Confirm the baked-in fallback is restricted to the "ddx" plugin name (path empty; callers use `defaultplugin.FS()`). Land or update the skill-install-topology ADR (`docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-027-skill-install-topology.md` or the equivalent ADR-025 referenced by the epic) documenting the project→global→baked-in precedence and the two install layers it governs.

NON-SCOPE
- Removing the existing per-project install path (both in-tree and convention modes coexist).
- Changing the install/update commands themselves (slices 2 and 3).
- Migrating any `~/.config/ddx/` legacy paths.

DEPS
- ddx-06cbaa90 (ddx home resolution): precedence routes through `ddxroot.Path()` and `ddxroot.GlobalDir()`; both must be agreed before this lands.
- Foundational for sibling slices (global install, project install, init+doctor) which all rely on this precedence.
bead.acceptance:
1. `TestPluginLookup_PrefersProjectOverGlobal` (cli/internal/registry/resolve_test.go:23) asserts that when both the project and global trees contain the plugin, `ResolvePlugin` returns the project path with layer "project".
2. `TestPluginLookup_FallsBackToGlobal` (cli/internal/registry/resolve_test.go:52) asserts that when the project copy is absent but the global copy exists, `ResolvePlugin` returns the global path with layer "global".
3. `TestPluginLookup_BakedInDefaultOnly` (resolve_test.go:115) asserts the baked-in layer is returned only for the "ddx" plugin name and yields an empty path.
4. The skill-install-topology ADR is created or updated to document the project→global→baked-in precedence and is committed in this bead.
5. cd cli && go test ./internal/registry/... green.
6. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
